pageContext.name: VOLTEQ Dunny
pageContext.description: Kidrobot has teamed up with artist Quiccs to bring to life the fusion of TEQ and Dunny in an epic creation.   Introducing the VOLTEQ Dunny 20 Vinyl Art Figure by Philippines-based illustrator, toy designer, and graffiti artist Quiccs. This giant 20 Dunny is a mecha-inspired statement piece based on the artist's TEQ63 character, a post-apocalyptic hero living in a dystopian society.  Quiccs is inspired by a love of Japanese robot culture and hip-hop, and has a vibrant street-art style that is instantly recognizable.   Don't miss your chance to own the VOLTEQ Dunny!
